nrmse_definition: NRMSE = sqrt(mean((phase_recon - phase_gt)^2)) / (max(phase_gt) - min(phase_gt)), where phase_gt = angle(GT) - mean(angle(GT)) and phase_recon = angle(recon) - mean(angle(recon)). Mean subtraction resolves the global phase ambiguity of ptychographic reconstruction.
ncc_definition: NCC = dot(phase_recon.flatten(), phase_gt.flatten()) / (||phase_recon|| * ||phase_gt||) (cosine similarity on mean-subtracted phase maps, per CLAUDE.md standard).
